info.title: CampusCoffeeConsumption API
info.description: REST API for tracking the coffee consumption of SE@UHD group members: members bump their own count via a secret capability link, and admins manage members and adjust counts.

tags.name: Admin expenses
tags.description: Recording, correcting, and deleting members' bean purchases (admin only).

tags.name: Kitty
tags.description: The communal kitty: balance, history, deposits, and adjustments (admin only).

tags.name: Dev data
tags.description: Dev-only endpoints to clear, load, and inspect test data in the database.

tags.name: Consumption
tags.description: Adding and undoing a member's own coffees (X-Capability-Token).

tags.name: Expenses
tags.description: A member recording their own bean purchases (X-Capability-Token).

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: The authenticated user's own profile and capability link.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Exchange credentials for a stateless JWT bearer token.

tags.name: Admin activity
tags.description: The whole-installation activity feed and its CSV export (admin only).

tags.name: Self-service
tags.description: The authenticated member's own landing summary and activity (X-Capability-Token).

tags.name: Price
tags.description: Setting and inspecting the global coffee price (admin only).

tags.name: User consumption (admin)
tags.description: Admin view and adjustment of any member's coffee consumption.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Admin operations for managing members and their capability links.

get.summary: Get user by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the user to retrieve.

200.description: The user with the provided ID as a JSON object.

404.description: No user with the provided ID could be found.

403.description: The authenticated user lacks the role required for this operation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the user to update.

200.description: The updated user as a JSON object.

400.description: Validation failed (e.g., IDs in path and body do not match, bean validation error).

401.description: Authentication is required.

403.description: The authenticated user may not update this user (e.g., not the owner, or not an admin).

404.description: No user with the provided ID could be found.

409.description: A user with the same unique identifier already exists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the user to delete.

401.description: Authentication is required.

403.description: The authenticated user may not delete this user (e.g., not an admin).

404.description: No user with the provided ID could be found.

409.description: The user cannot be deleted because other data still references it.

UserDto.description: Data of the member to create, including their role.
